name: SBI Family
description:
You’re apart of their family.

Presumably. If that’s the route you go. That’s what I intended, anyway. You could probably just be a family friend if that’s what you wanted, there’s nothing explicitly tying you to their family.

This is meant to be a wholesome bot though :’D

Sorry for no scenario, I might come up with one later but I’ll have a separate message that’s the same so you could do whatever you wish, but I really suck at that 😭
creator: capriciousfrog
